case_title: LOPATA, REGINA VS KUO, JOYCE DBA OVERSEAS CHINESE MARKETING GROUP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPATA, REGINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KUO, JOYCE DBA OVERSEAS CHINESE MARKETING GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
